overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character in a cowboy hat walking through natural landscapes at dusk. The character traverses open grasslands, enters a narrow rocky canyon, and emerges onto a cliffside path overlooking a river.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with scattered pine trees and distant mountains

events.description: approaching large rocky outcrop marking the entrance to a narrow canyon passage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward a rocky formation in the distance

entered.detail: tall green grass covering the ground in the open field
tall evergreen trees scattered across the landscape
mountain silhouettes visible against the cloudy dusk sky
prominent rocky formation rising from the grass ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open grassland at dusk, with scattered pine trees and distant mountains visible under a partly cloudy sky. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches a large rocky outcrop that marks the entrance to a narrow passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon with steep walls

events.description: entering narrow canyon between tall rock walls
light increases as approaching the canyon exit ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating carefully down the rocky path between steep canyon walls

entered.detail: tall steep rock wall forming the left side of the narrow passage
tall steep rock wall forming the right side of the narrow passage
uneven rocky terrain replacing the grassy field

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a narrow rocky canyon, with steep stone walls rising on both sides blocking most of the sky. The lighting becomes darker and more enclosed as the character navigates the winding path downward, with vegetation visible at the canyon exit ahead.

events.description: exiting narrow canyon onto open cliffside path with river view

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow cliffside path with a river visible below to the right

entered.detail: water flowing through the valley below the cliff edge
steep drop-off leading down to the river
thick bushes and undergrowth along the path

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the canyon, the scene opens to reveal a river flowing through the valley below. The character continues along a narrow dirt path on the cliffside, surrounded by dense vegetation and pine trees, with the rocky terrain now flanking the left side while the right side drops off to the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive grassland at dusk into a claustrophobic canyon before emerging onto a scenic cliffside overlook. It begins by following the character through open fields dotted with pine trees and distant mountains, moving steadily toward a large rocky outcrop. As the character enters the narrow passage, the scene shifts into a deep rocky canyon where steep stone walls enclose the space and the lighting grows darker. The camera then follows the winding descent until the terrain opens up again, revealing a river flowing through the valley below. Finally, the path expands into a lush cliffside trail flanked by dense vegetation and pine trees, with the rocky walls giving way to a steep drop-off overlooking the water.
